'''âz-sh-v''' ('''kazashav''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:veganise|veganise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-sh-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:veganise|veganise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âz-sh-v
|-
! Lemma
| kazashav
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizashav|thizashav]] || [[word:jizashav|jizashav]] || [[word:shizashav|shizashav]] || [[word:kizashav|kizashav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuzashav|thuthuzashav]] || [[word:jujuzashav|jujuzashav]] || [[word:shushuzashav|shushuzashav]] || [[word:kukuzashav|kukuzashav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuzashav|thuzashav]] || [[word:juzashav|juzashav]] || [[word:shuzashav|shuzashav]] || [[word:kuzashav|kuzashav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuzashav|thuzashav]] || [[word:juzashav|juzashav]] || [[word:shuzashav|shuzashav]] || [[word:kuzashav|kuzashav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thezashav|thezashav]] || [[word:jezashav|jezashav]] || [[word:shezashav|shezashav]] || [[word:kezashav|kezashav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothozashav|thothozashav]] || [[word:jojozashav|jojozashav]] || [[word:shoshozashav|shoshozashav]] || [[word:kokozashav|kokozashav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thozashav|thozashav]] || [[word:jozashav|jozashav]] || [[word:shozashav|shozashav]] || [[word:kozashav|kozashav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozashav|thozashav]] || [[word:jozashav|jozashav]] || [[word:shozashav|shozashav]] || [[word:kozashav|kozashav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠzashav|thĂŠzashav]] || [[word:jĂŠzashav|jĂŠzashav]] || [[word:shĂŠzashav|shĂŠzashav]] || [[word:kĂŠzashav|kĂŠzashav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathazashav|thathazashav]] || [[word:jajazashav|jajazashav]] || [[word:shashazashav|shashazashav]] || [[word:kakazashav|kakazashav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazashav|thazashav]] || [[word:jazashav|jazashav]] || [[word:shazashav|shazashav]] || [[word:kazashav|kazashav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazashav|thazashav]] || [[word:jazashav|jazashav]] || [[word:shazashav|shazashav]] || [[word:kazashav|kazashav]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shazashav|shazashav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshazashav|goshazashav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishazashav|gokishazashav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shazashavnĂŒ|shazashavnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshazashavnknĂŒ|goshazashavnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishazashavnĂŒ|gokishazashavnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shazashavshĂ«|shazashavshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshazashavnkshĂ«|goshazashavnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishazashavshĂ«|gokishazashavshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazashavro|shazashavro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazashavnkro|goshazashavnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazashavro|gokishazashavro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shazashavmu|shazashavmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazashavnkmu|goshazashavnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazashavmu|gokishazashavmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shazashavsher|shazashavsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshazashavnksher|goshazashavnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishazashavsher|gokishazashavsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shazashavng|shazashavng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshazashavnkng|goshazashavnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishazashavng|gokishazashavng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shazashavya|shazashavya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshazashavnkya|goshazashavnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishazashavya|gokishazashavya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shazashavyam|shazashavyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshazashavnkyam|goshazashavnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishazashavyam|gokishazashavyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazashavnĂŒshĂ«|shazashavnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazashavnknĂŒshĂ«|goshazashavnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazashavnĂŒshĂ«|gokishazashavnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazashavnĂŒro|shazashavnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazashavnknĂŒro|goshazashavnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazashavnĂŒro|gokishazashavnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazashavnĂŒmu|shazashavnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazashavnknĂŒmu|goshazashavnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazashavnĂŒmu|gokishazashavnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazashavshĂ«nĂŒ|shazashavshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazashavnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshazashavnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazashavshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishazashavshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazashavshĂ«ro|shazashavshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazashavnkshĂ«ro|goshazashavnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazashavshĂ«ro|gokishazashavshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazashavshĂ«mu|shazashavshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazashavnkshĂ«mu|goshazashavnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazashavshĂ«mu|gokishazashavshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazashavronĂŒ|shazashavronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazashavnkronĂŒ|goshazashavnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazashavronĂŒ|gokishazashavronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazashavroshĂ«|shazashavroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazashavnkroshĂ«|goshazashavnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazashavroshĂ«|gokishazashavroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazashavromu|shazashavromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazashavnkromu|goshazashavnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazashavromu|gokishazashavromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazashavmunĂŒ|shazashavmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazashavnkmunĂŒ|goshazashavnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazashavmunĂŒ|gokishazashavmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazashavmushĂ«|shazashavmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazashavnkmushĂ«|goshazashavnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazashavmushĂ«|gokishazashavmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazashavmuro|shazashavmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazashavnkmuro|goshazashavnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazashavmuro|gokishazashavmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
